home.title: Welcome to E-Store - Amazing Products & Great Deals
home.description: Discover our amazing collection of products with fast shipping and secure checkout. Shop electronics, fashion, home goods and more at E-Store.

category.title: Shop by Category - Find What You Need
category.description: Browse our wide range of product categories. Find electronics, fashion, home & garden items, and everything you need for your lifestyle.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How can I track my order?
faq.a1: You can track your order using the tracking number provided in your confirmation email.
faq.a2: We accept returns within 30 days of purchase. Items must be in original condition.
faq.a3: Yes, we ship to most countries worldwide. Shipping costs vary by location.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.description: Learn the basics and get started with our platform

account.title: Account & Profile
account.description: Manage your account settings and profile information

shopping.title: Shopping Guide
shopping.description: Learn how to browse, search, and purchase products

orders.title: Orders & Tracking
orders.description: Track orders, manage deliveries, and handle returns

payment.title: Payment & Billing
payment.description: Payment methods, billing questions, and refunds

shipping.question: How long does shipping take?
shipping.answer: Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days. Express shipping is available for 1-2 business days.

returns.question: What is your return policy?
returns.answer: We offer a 30-day return policy on most items. Returns are free for defective items.

payment.question: What payment methods do you accept?
payment.answer: We accept credit cards, debit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers.

account.question: How do I reset my password?
account.answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the sign-in page and follow the instructions sent to your email.

tracking.question: How can I track my order?
tracking.answer: Use the tracking number from your confirmation email on our tracking page.

contact.title: Still need help?
contact.description: Can't find what you're looking for? Our support team is here to help.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.lastUpdatedText: This Privacy Policy was last updated on July 9, 2026.

informationWeCollect.title: Information We Collect
informationWeCollect.description: We collect information that you provide directly to us, including when you create an account, make a purchase, or contact us for support.

items.personal: Personal information such as name, email address, and phone number
items.usage: Usage data including pages visited, time spent, and interactions
items.cookies: Cookie data to enhance your browsing experience

howWeUse.title: How We Use Your Information
howWeUse.description: We use your information to process orders, improve our services, and communicate with you about your account and purchases.

dataProtection.title: Data Protection
dataProtection.description: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure.

yourRights.title: Your Rights
yourRights.description: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. Contact us to exercise these rights.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact our support team.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.description: By accessing and using our e-commerce platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions.

useLicense.title: Use License
useLicense.description: Permission is granted to temporarily use our platform for personal, non-commercial purposes only.

orders.title: Orders and Payments
orders.description: All orders are subject to acceptance and availability. We reserve the right to refuse any order.

pricing.title: Pricing and Payment
pricing.description: Prices are subject to change without notice. Payment must be received before order processing.

limitation.title: Limitation of Liability
limitation.description: We shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of our platform.

governingLaw.title: Governing Law
governingLaw.description: These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with applicable laws.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.description: For any questions regarding these terms, please reach out to our customer support.
